summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VoyCargo tracking feature integration with real API. All 11 test scenarios passed successfully.
passed_tests: Successful search for VOY00013 returns result with current status
404 error for INVALID999 shows friendly error message 'Orden no encontrada'
Query parameter ?orden=VOY00013 auto-executes search on page load
'Buscar otra orden' button clears result and input field
Loading state displays spinner while API call is in progress
Order number displayed in orange color #E67332 (rgb(230, 115, 50))
Status badge shows dynamic color from API response
Date formatted in Chilean Spanish locale (e.g., '14 mar 2026, 04:25 p. m.')
Responsive design works correctly on mobile (390x844 viewport)
Timeline displays empty state message when no history available
All UI elements (input, button, card, badge, timeline) render correctly
Error handling provides user-friendly messages with order number
'Intentar de nuevo' button works on error state
